queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Citrix Workspace %' AND publisher = 'Citrix Systems, Inc.';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Citrix Workspace %' AND publisher = 'Citrix Systems, Inc.' AND version_compare(version, '26.3.1.194') < 0);
